3299990.name: MEMORALYSIS: The Scorched Home
3299990.description:
An unusual case calls for an unusual detective.

MEMORALYSIS: The Scorched Home is a murder mystery visual novel with point-and-click elements about a semi-psychic detective and a girl everyone seems to think is cursed. Follow private detective Philon Delancy to the seaside town of Liselle-sur-Mer and solve the murder of one of its most notable public figures. What starts as a routine house call quickly reveals a tangle of messy relationships, local superstitions, and past unsolved mysteries. At the center of it all is the victim’s enigmatic niece, Celosia James.

Philon isn't one to balk at whisperings of the occult. How could he, when the greatest tool at his disposal is the ability to catch glimpses of his suspects’ memories? But surely the rumors about the young heiress have been greatly exaggerated. After all, everyone knows demonic possession isn’t real.

Welcome to Liselle-sur-Mer

  • Investigate the mysterious seaside town of Liselle-sur-Mer and unearth its long-buried secrets.

  • Question a lively cast of characters to find the truth about the murder of Rhys Beaumont.

  • Use Philon's abilities to dive into suspects' memories and uncover the things they won't say.
